[SCOUT 2026-04-03] Found via Google search for independent estate agents in Birmingham. Website: exists at mak-estates.co.uk but returned 403 (bot-protected) — assessed via search results and directory listings. Listed on major portals (OnTheMarket, Zoopla, allAgents). NAEA and ARLA Propertymark member with Client Money Protection. Located at 192 Stoney Lane, Balsall Heath, B12 8AN. Facebook page active (facebook.com/makestates). allAgents ratings: 86% valuation accuracy, 88% recommend, 100% fee satisfaction. Mixed reviews — staff praised for speed (keys handed over in 3 days in one case) but one negative review about rudeness. Est. traditional agency covering Birmingham, Solihull and surrounding areas with area guide pages (Sparkhill confirmed). Differentiator: traditional personal service with NAEA accreditation. Competitors in area include Purplebricks (online), Connells (chain), James Laurence (local). Pain points: (1) no confirmed online booking/instant valuation — likely losing after-hours leads to competitors with automated valuation tools; (2) traditional phone-based enquiry handling — probable slow response to web enquiries; (3) limited Google review presence compared to competitors — no Trustpilot presence found.

[SCORING RATIONALE] Score: 62/100. Top factors: (1) Estate Agent = 20 pts — appointment-based service with high conversion potential for Lead Intake solution; (2) Under 10 visible Google reviews + positive sentiment = 12 pts — limited review presence suggests no review generation strategy; (3) Appointment-based business = 10 pts — viewings and valuations are core revenue drivers that benefit from automated booking. Data points checked: website via WebFetch (403), Google search results, allAgents profile, OnTheMarket listing, Zoopla listing, Facebook page, Wheree directory (403), Yelp listing. Red flags: email not found despite 4 methods tried (Google search, Facebook, directory listings, website fetch).

[SCOUT 2026-04-03] Found via Google search for independent lettings agencies in Bristol. Website: exists at jbsbristol.co.uk but returned 403 (bot-protected) — assessed via search results and directory listings. Independent letting agency at 91 Bishop Rd, Bishopston, Bristol BS7 8LX. Est. 2016. Email: lettings@jbsbristol.co.uk. Phone: 0117 244 0146 / 0117 911 2919. Small team — Jack and Angeliki mentioned by name in reviews. Services: let only, full property management, room/student lets, refurbishments, buy to let advice. Facebook active (facebook.com/jbsbristol.co.uk). Listed on Rightmove, allAgents, Yell, Cylex, FindTheNeedle. allAgents: 88% valuation accuracy, 79% recommend, 95% fee satisfaction. Goal is to be 'highest-rated letting agents in Bristol on customer service'. Reviews polarised: landlords praise tenant screening and professionalism but tenants report communication lapses and slow maintenance response — some experienced mould and plumbing failures with long delays. Pain points: (1) maintenance communication breakdown — tenants report weeks of unresolved issues, indicating no automated maintenance request/tracking system; (2) small team managing full lettings cycle — Lead Intake would automate landlord enquiries and tenant screening; (3) 79% recommend rate with aspiration to be highest-rated — Email Assistant for automated tenant updates would close the communication gap.

[SCORING RATIONALE] Score: 60/100. Top factors: (1) Lettings Agency = 20 pts — functionally equivalent to estate agent with appointment-based viewings and high Lead Intake conversion potential; (2) Email found = 15 pts — direct outreach to lettings@jbsbristol.co.uk; (3) Appointment-based = 10 pts — property viewings and landlord meetings are core business. Data points checked: website via WebFetch (403), Google search, allAgents profile, Rightmove listing, Yell listing, Cylex directory, FindTheNeedle, Facebook page. Red flags: maintenance complaint pattern suggests operational issues — our solutions help with communication but can't fix underlying maintenance quality. 79% recommend rate needs investigation.
